title: leontodon salzmannii var. hispanicus
intro: Leontodon salzmannii var. hispanicus, commonly known as the Iberian hawk's beard or Salzmann's hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Leontodon salzmannii var. hispanicus can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues and promote overall well-being.
